item.title: A Long Pipe Stem on the Thames Foreshore
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and uncovers a long pipe stem, a small find that offers a glimpse into everyday history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: A Long Pipe Stem on the Thames Foreshore
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and uncovers a long pipe stem, a small find that offers a glimpse into everyday history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: WWII Sign and Thames Foreshore Finds
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and researches a WWII sign alongside other historical finds, revealing everyday stories from the river. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London

media:content.media:title: WWII Sign and Thames Foreshore Finds
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and researches a WWII sign alongside other historical finds, revealing everyday stories from the river. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London

item.title: A Tiny Coin Found Mudlarking
item.description: Nicola White finds a tiny coin while mudlarking the Thames foreshore, where small objects can reveal everyday history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: A Tiny Coin Found Mudlarking
media:content.media:description: Nicola White finds a tiny coin while mudlarking the Thames foreshore, where small objects can reveal everyday history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: A Rare Thames Find on the Foreshore
item.description: Nicola White spots a rare find on the Thames foreshore and explores its story through mudlarking and research. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: A Rare Thames Find on the Foreshore
media:content.media:description: Nicola White spots a rare find on the Thames foreshore and explores its story through mudlarking and research. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: An Old Lamp and a Shoe Buckle Found
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and uncovers an old muddy lamp and a pretty shoe buckle, sharing their historical context. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: An Old Lamp and a Shoe Buckle Found
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and uncovers an old muddy lamp and a pretty shoe buckle, sharing their historical context. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Mystery Finds on the River Thames
item.description: Exploring mystery finds while mudlarking the River Thames, where small objects reveal everyday history and stories from the foreshore. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Mystery Finds on the River Thames
media:content.media:description: Exploring mystery finds while mudlarking the River Thames, where small objects reveal everyday history and stories from the foreshore. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Discovering a Beautiful Plate on the Thames
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and researches a beautiful plate find, showing how even small objects can reveal everyday history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Discovering a Beautiful Plate on the Thames
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and researches a beautiful plate find, showing how even small objects can reveal everyday history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames
